org.apache.flink.api.java.operators

## Class DataSource<OUT>

  * [java.lang.Object](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
  *     * [org.apache.flink.api.java.DataSet](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/DataSet.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.java")<OUT>
    *       * [org.apache.flink.api.java.operators.Operator](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/Operator.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.java.operators")<OUT,[DataSource](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/DataSource.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.java.operators")<OUT>>
      *         * org.apache.flink.api.java.operators.DataSource<OUT>

  * Type Parameters:
    `OUT` \- The type of the elements produced by this data source.

* * *




        [@Public](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/annotation/Public.html> "annotation in org.apache.flink.annotation")
        public class DataSource<OUT>
        extends [Operator](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/Operator.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.java.operators")<OUT,[DataSource](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/DataSource.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.java.operators")<OUT>>

An operation that creates a new data set (data source). The operation acts as the data set on which to apply further transformations. It encapsulates additional configuration parameters, to customize the execution.

  *     * ### Field Summary

      * ### Fields inherited from class org.apache.flink.api.java.operators.[Operator](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/Operator.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.java.operators")

      * #### DataSource

            public DataSource([ExecutionEnvironment](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/ExecutionEnvironment.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.java") context,
                              [InputFormat](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/common/io/InputFormat.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.common.io")<[OUT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/DataSource.html> "type parameter in DataSource"),?> inputFormat,
                              [TypeInformation](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/common/typeinfo/TypeInformation.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.common.typeinfo")<[OUT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/DataSource.html> "type parameter in DataSource")> type,
                              [String](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/String.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang") dataSourceLocationName)

Creates a new data source.

Parameters:
    `context` \- The environment in which the data source gets executed.
    `inputFormat` \- The input format that the data source executes.
    `type` \- The type of the elements produced by this input format.
    * ### Method Detail

      * #### getInputFormat

            [@Internal](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/annotation/Internal.html> "annotation in org.apache.flink.annotation")
            public [InputFormat](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/common/io/InputFormat.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.common.io")<[OUT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/DataSource.html> "type parameter in DataSource"),?> getInputFormat()

Gets the input format that is executed by this data source.

Returns:
    The input format that is executed by this data source.
      * #### withParameters

            public [DataSource](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/DataSource.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.java.operators")<[OUT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/DataSource.html> "type parameter in DataSource")> withParameters([Configuration](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/configuration/Configuration.html> "class in org.apache.flink.configuration") parameters)

Parameters:
    `parameters` \- Configuration parameters
      * #### getParameters

            public [Configuration](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/configuration/Configuration.html> "class in org.apache.flink.configuration") getParameters()

Returns:
    Configuration for the InputFormat.
      * #### getSplitDataProperties

            [@PublicEvolving](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/annotation/PublicEvolving.html> "annotation in org.apache.flink.annotation")
            public [SplitDataProperties](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/io/SplitDataProperties.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.java.io")<[OUT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/operators/DataSource.html> "type parameter in DataSource")> getSplitDataProperties()

Returns the [`SplitDataProperties`](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/java/io/SplitDataProperties.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.java.io") for the [`InputSplit`](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/io/InputSplit.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.core.io")s of this DataSource for configurations.

SplitDataProperties can help to generate more efficient execution plans.

**IMPORTANT: Incorrect configuration of SplitDataProperties can cause wrong results!**

Returns:
    The SplitDataProperties for the InputSplits of this DataSource.
